Follow us:

What We Do

We invest in communities across the Pacific Northwest to strengthen arts and culture, empower the next generation of changemakers, and support a global network of partners dedicated to protecting wildlife, preserving ecosystems, and creating lasting change.

Connected By Community

Our philosophy for the foundation's three program areas—Arts & Culture, Youth, and Environment—is rooted in the belief that all three merge to contribute to a healthy, thriving community. Community is the defining principle that is woven throughout all of our investments; it is the very heart of our work. 

Arts and cultural experiences contribute to a deeper understanding of ourselves and others, helping to foster connection and strengthen communities. Science-based innovations are most impactful when developed in partnership with communities, leading to durable and sustainable solutions that advance biodiversity, climate change, and human well-being goals. Empowering young people through meaningful leadership opportunities, intergenerational support, and access to essential resources expands the number and diversity of youth acting on issues they deeply value—ultimately enhancing outcomes for youth and entire communities. 

When we each do our part, we create the foundation for collective wellbeing where creativity, future generations, and nature can flourish in the Pacific Northwest and beyond. 

Connected By Community

Our philosophy for the foundation's three program areas—Arts & Culture, Youth, and Environment—is rooted in the belief that all three merge to contribute to a healthy, thriving community. Community is the defining principle that is woven throughout all of our investments; it is the very heart of our work. 

Arts and cultural experiences contribute to a deeper understanding of ourselves and others, helping to foster connection and strengthen communities. Science-based innovations are most impactful when developed in partnership with communities, leading to durable and sustainable solutions that advance biodiversity, climate change, and human well-being goals. Empowering young people through meaningful leadership opportunities, intergenerational support, and access to essential resources expands the number and diversity of youth acting on issues they deeply value—ultimately enhancing outcomes for youth and entire communities. 

When we each do our part, we create the foundation for collective wellbeing where creativity, future generations, and nature can flourish in the Pacific Northwest and beyond. 

Our Values & Approach

Our values as a funder are to be rigorous, authentic, equitable, creative, collaborative, and accountable in all our connections and interactions with our grantees, other funders, and the community we serve. 

In all that we do, we strive to understand the needs of the organizations and projects we invest in, seek out creative and novel solutions with high potential for impact, convene and engage partners to magnify our collective work, and adapt to and learn from changing circumstances. 

We are guided by what we learn from our grantee partners, who are deeply rooted in their communities, hold invaluable wisdom, and are closest to both challenges and their solutions. Their commitment and creativity inspire us daily as they strive to make the world more vibrant, equitable, and sustainable. Learning from them allows us to grow in understanding and ensure that our support truly aligns with the transformative work they lead. 

Our Values & Approach

Our values as a funder are to be rigorous, authentic, equitable, creative, collaborative, and accountable in all our connections and interactions with our grantees, other funders, and the community we serve. 

In all that we do, we strive to understand the needs of the organizations and projects we invest in, seek out creative and novel solutions with high potential for impact, convene and engage partners to magnify our collective work, and adapt to and learn from changing circumstances. 

We are guided by what we learn from our grantee partners, who are deeply rooted in their communities, hold invaluable wisdom, and are closest to both challenges and their solutions. Their commitment and creativity inspire us daily as they strive to make the world more vibrant, equitable, and sustainable. Learning from them allows us to grow in understanding and ensure that our support truly aligns with the transformative work they lead.

Arts & Culture

Increasing access to diverse arts, cultural, and heritage experiences for everyone.

Learn more about our work in Arts & Culture

Youth

Supporting youth changemakers to strengthen and move our communities forward.

Learn more about our work in Youth

Environment

Protecting and restoring our planet’s biodiversity through scientific solutions rooted in community partnerships.

Learn more about our work in Environment

Stories
May 11, 2026

Tuning In: How distributed acoustic sensing is transforming orca conservation in the PNW

With less than 75 Southern Resident orcas remaining in the Pacific Northwest, studying, understanding, and protecting this endangered population is urgent.

Arts & Culture
Stories
Apr 1, 2026

A new blueprint for connection takes root in Seattle

The Chamber of Connection’s Seattle Chapter is leading the way to a more connected society, a fundamental need for thriving communities.

Youth
Press Releases
Apr 21, 2026

Responsible Technology Youth Power Fund Announces $1.9 Million in Grants to Third Cohort of Youth-led Organizations

This fund's focus is power-sharing in grantmaking, inviting young leaders to move from recipients to decision-makers

Keep in Touch

We’re excited to connect with you and share regular updates across our arts and culture, environment, and youth programs. Sign up to hear about new RFPs, grantee news, and updates from the Allen Family Philanthropies team.

Building thriving and resilient communities in the Pacific Northwest and beyond.
